heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy north, mostly cloudy south. A chance of rain showers far south. Lows from the upper 50s to near 60. Calm wind.

heading: Monday
text: A few pockets of sun north, mostly cloudy south with a chance of rain showers. Highs in the 80s north, a few 70s south. Calm wind turning southeast.

heading: Monday Night
text: Partly cloudy. A chance of showers mainly south of Route 2, slight chance north. Lows from the upper 50s to low 60s. Calm wind.
